creator: ultrageranium@bleu255.com
text:
My bad!

Problem came from drm-fbsd12.0-kmod needing to be recompiled. Sorry for the noise :(

On the plus side, r351914 really fixed the resume delays for me and I do not have nvme error messages. Thanks a lot for the fix! Hopefully it will also work for those that had deadlocks on top of the delays.
